mainZh: 满地都是六便士，他却抬头看见了月亮
mainEn: Everyone has sixpence, he looked up at the moon

mainZh: 所谓自由，就是被别人讨厌
mainEn: Freedom is being disliked by others

mainEn: What is essential is invisible to the eye
